title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Youth Development Co-operative Bank Ltd., Kolhapur, Maharashtra
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated May 06, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹40,000/- (Rupees Forty Thousand only) on Youth Development Co-operative Bank Ltd., Kolhapur, Maharashtra (the bank) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Inoperative Accounts / Unclaimed Deposits in Banks – Revised Instructions' and ‘Know Your Customer’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of
